task285.rule: Find each 2x2 color hub, recover the one shown rooted creature, reflect it into all nonzero hub quadrants, and recolor each copy with that quadrant's hub color.

task286.rule: Treat cyan as closed; flood cardinally through non-cyan cells from every colored seed, paint reached cells with the row-major-last seed color for absolute coordinate parity, preserve cyan, and leave other cells black.
